name: stare-mcp
description: Exploratory federal case law search via CourtListener: search cases, retrieve opinion passages, verify citations, and see how cases are cited.
long_description: Five tools over the CourtListener API: search_cases (metadata-only search sorted by court level), fetch_passages (paragraph-aligned opinion text with retrieval fragment IDs), verify_citations (batch-validate citations in a draft against the official database — catches fabricated citations), how_cited (cases citing an opinion, newest first), and list_courts (federal court reference data). All responses are structured JSON with provenance envelopes. This is an exploratory surface, not a legal research system: no citator, no negative-treatment checks.

courtlistener_api_key.title: CourtListener API key
courtlistener_api_key.description: Get a free key at courtlistener.com/help/api/rest (free tier: 5 requests/minute).

tools.name: search_cases
tools.description: Search federal case law or look up a citation; metadata sorted by court level

tools.name: fetch_passages
tools.description: Retrieve paragraph-aligned opinion text with retrieval fragment IDs

tools.name: verify_citations
tools.description: Validate every citation in a block of text against CourtListener

tools.name: how_cited
tools.description: List cases citing an opinion, newest first

tools.name: list_courts
tools.description: List covered federal courts (local data, no API request)
